test.query: WITH RECURSIVE 1400 AS width, 800 AS height, 256 AS max_iterations, pixels AS ( SELECT arrayJoin(range(width)) AS x, arrayJoin(range(height)) AS y, -2.5 + ((x * 3.5) / (width - 1)) AS cx, -1.0 + ((y * 2.0) / (height - 1)) AS cy ), mandelbrot_iterations AS ( SELECT x, y, cx, cy, 0.0 AS zx, 0.0 AS zy, 0 AS iteration FROM pixels UNION ALL SELECT x, y, cx, cy, (zx * zx - zy * zy) + cx, (2.0 * zx * zy) + cy, iteration + 1 FROM mandelbrot_iterations WHERE (iteration < max_iterations) AND ((zx * zx + zy * zy) <= 4.0) ), max(iteration) AS it, log2(0 + it) / 8 AS v SELECT v < 0.25 ? least(v, 0.25) * 4 : 0 AS b, least(greatest(v, 0.25) - 0.25, 0.5) * 2 AS r, (greatest(v, 0.75) - 0.75) * 4 AS g FROM mandelbrot_iterations GROUP BY x, y ORDER BY y, x FORMAT Null
